attributes.description: This is a layer that contains the tax parcels within the Corporate City Limits of the City of Newark, Delaware.  Labels are set to display the street number of the parcel when zoomed in far enough.  This layer points to our Newark Parcel feature class on our SDE database, which we get directly from New Castle County, Delaware.

renderer.valueExpression: IIf(Find("18", $feature.PRCLID, 0) > -1 ,"City of Newark Parcel", "New Castle County Parcel")
IIf(Find("18", $feature.PRCLID, 0) > -1 ,"City of Newark Parcel", "New Castle County Parcel")

attributes.description:
These county parcels are a service of New Castle County, Delaware.  FirstMap shares them from our organization, however, the care and feeding of the service belongs to New Castle County.  They can be contacted at the following address:


Organization Name: New Castle County, GIS (Division of the Department of Land Use)
Email address: gis.services@nccde.org
Mail address: 87 Reads Way | New Castle, DE. 19720
Phone voice: 302-395-5557
Phone fax: 302-395-5551

domain.description: Municipal IDs

layers.description: The New Castle County GIS Tax Map is a collection of data extracted from New Castle County's automated tax mapping system that includes representations of all geographic tax parcels in New Castle County, DE. Also included is information on incorporated areas (towns), and hydrology (i.e. streams). Data in in ARCVIEW Shape File Format using the Delaware State Plane Coordinate System NAD83 in units of feet.

structuredLicense.text: The State of Delaware makes no warranty or representation, expressed or implied, with respect to the quality, content, accuracy, completeness, currency, or non-infringement of proprietary rights, of any of the GIS or other data or information, or any other materials and items, that are displayed or made available for download from this site. All such data, information, items and materials (collectively, the “FirstMap Data”) are provided "as is" and users are fully and solely responsible for any consequences of use. FirstMap Data may have been created from a variety of sources, including sources beyond the control of the State of Delaware, and are subject to change without notice. To the extent you use, apply, add to, modify or implement this information in your own information system or other setting, or otherwise for your own purposes, you do so at your own risk. In no event shall the State of Delaware or its agencies, officers, employees, agents, or representatives be liable for any damages of any kind or nature whatsoever including, but not limited to, direct, indirect, special, punitive, incidental, exemplary or consequential damages arising from your downloading, modifying, sharing, distributing, or using of FirstMap Data even if notified of the possibility of such damages.  Further, the State of Delaware does not accept liability for any damages or misrepresentation caused by inaccuracies in the FirstMap Data or as a result of changes to the FirstMap Data, nor is there responsibility assumed to maintain the FirstMap Data in any manner or form.

attributes.snippet: New Castle County Parcels

name: <mark class="hub-search-highlight name-highlight">Delaware</mark> New Castle County <mark class="hub-search-highlight name-highlight">Parcels</mark>
searchDescription: These county <mark class="hub-search-highlight searchDescription-highlight">parcels</mark> are a service of New Castle County, <mark class="hub-search-highlight searchDescription-highlight">Delaware</mark>.  FirstMap shares them from our organization, however, the care and feeding of the service belongs to New Castle County.  They can be contacted at the following address:    Organization Name: New Castle County, GIS (Division of the Department of Land Use) Email address: gis.services@nccde.org Mail address: 87 Reads Way | New Castle, DE. 19720 Phone voice: 302-395-5557 Phone fax: 302-395-5551

attributes.description: This dataset form is GIS based consisting of digital data for all Parcels within Delaware County, OHIO.

distinfo.distliab: Information contained within this data set may be used to generally locate, identify, and inventory land parcels and related layers within Delaware County. There are inherent errors and limitations associated with this type information. In no event shall Delaware County or its service provider be liable for damages that may arise from the use of this data set or the information that is contained within including, but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, business, or other pecuniary loss. This information cannot be construed or used as a "legal description" of a parcel.
distinfo.custom: Send $5.00 for Arc Explorer Generic CD (shape files), $7.50 for Dalis-View CD (shape files), and $ 20.00 for Dalis Data CD (DXF and ArcInfo E00 files) or Arc Explorer Custom CD (shape files).  Orthophotos are available for $25.00 and are current as of April 2002. Please make checks payable to Delaware County Auditor and mail to DALIS Project Office 140 N. Sandusky St. Delaware, OHIO 43015.

stdorder.turnarnd: within 3 days of receiving check or money order
stdorder.ordering: Send $5.00 for Arc Explorer Generic CD (shape files), $7.50 for Dalis-View CD (shape files), and $ 20.00 for Dalis Data CD (DXF and ArcInfo E00 files) or Arc Explorer Custom CD (shape files).  We also sell our Orthophotos which is a set of 4 CD's and 2 DVD's for $25.00. Please make checks payable to Delaware County Auditor and mail to DALIS Project Office 140 N. Sandusky St. Delaware, OHIO 43015.

srcinfo.srccontr: Manatron (SABRE) of Portage, MI originally created our Parcels from deeds recorded.

citeinfo.origin: Delaware Appraisal Land Information System (DALIS) Project
citeinfo.title: Parcels

procstep.procdesc: The Delaware County Auditor hired Manatron (SABRE) of Portage, MI in October 1992 to digitize our Parcels off of deeds recorded. Attributes were assigned by the DALIS Project Staff. Dalis Staff has been updating this data set since 1998.

attracc.attraccr: This dataset has been checked by DALIS Project personnel for any line and attribute inaccuracies. Field verification was performed for areas where attribute information was questionable.

dataqual.logic: ARC/INFO software is used to create and maintain topological relationships between features.
dataqual.complete: This information is accurate and complete to the best of our knowledge.

horizpa.horizpar: The horizontal positional accuracy is tested by visual comparison of hard copy plats to the actual data received. We have also checked older parcels with the new Orthophotos for positional accuracy.

dataIdInfo.idAbs: This dataset form is GIS based consisting of digital data for all Parcels within Delaware County, OHIO.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: This data set was created to aid in the process of Geocoding and mapping

overview.eaover: All attributes are updated by the DALIS Project Staff on a weekly basis. If additional information is needed regarding this dataset please refer to our website at www.dalisproject.org/dalis_metadata.htm#parcels.
overview.dsoverv: If additional information is needed regarding this dataset please refer to our website at www.dalisproject.org/dalis_metadata.htm#parcels.

udom.#value: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attrdomv.udom: 14 digit number verifying location of parcel

A unique 7 digit character whos first two numbers represent the township the subdivision resides in, the next two numbers represent the cabinet the subdivision is recorded in and the last three digits represent the page number the subdivisions was recorded on.

attr.attrdef: Subdivision name as it appears on the plat

attrdomv.udom: Subdivision name as it appears on the plat
The first number represents the township the parcel resides in and the last two number represent the range

edom.edomvd: NORTH UNION - OSTRANDER CORP - BUCKEYE VALLEY
BROWN TWP - DELAWARE CORP - BUCKEYE VALLEY

attrdomv.udom: Old Tax ID numbers that were used before the creation of the current parcel numbers
The Owner's last & first name that currently own the property
The Co-Owner's first name that owns the property along with the Owner1
Street number and Road name assigned to a parcel to locate it
The City, State and Zip code that the parcel resides in
Detailed information about the parcel such as lot/unit numbers or subdivision/condo names
Total measurement in acres (43,560 sq. ft.) of a particular parcel of land
The most probable sale price in terms of money of a parcel of land in an open and competitive market
The most probable sale price in terms of money that a structure on a particular parcel would bring
The most probable sale price in terns of money of the land and building on a particular parcel
The amount of land for a particular parcel that can be taxed
The amount of buidling structures that a particular parcel has that can be taxed
The amount of land and buidling structures for a particular parcel that can be taxed
Is an adjustment to the market value when land and improvements are devoted to the production of crops, fruits, timber, or the raising of livestock
The most recent sale date for a particular parcel
The second most recent sale date for a particular parcel
The most recent sale value for a particular parcel
The second most recent sale value for a particular parcel
The most recent sale number for a particular parcel
The second most recent sale number for a particular parcel
The most recent conveyance number for a particular parcel
The second most recent conveyance number for a particular parcel
The total number of livings units with a structure
The number of stories of a structure
If the structure has a basement and the size of the basement or if it doesn't have a basement.
If the structure has crawl space and the size of the crawl space or if it doesn't have any crawl space.
The year that the structure was built
The year that the structure was remodeled
The structures total finished living area
The total number of rooms within the structure
The total number of bedrooms within the structure
The total number of family rooms within the structure
The total number of dining rooms within the structure
The total number of full bathrooms within the structure
The total number of half bathrooms within the structure
If the structure has an attic and the size of the attic or if it doesn't have an attic.
The type of garage that the structure has
The number of garages that the structure has
If a structure has a recreation room and if it doesn't the total area of the recreation room
The type of air conditioning the structure has
The total number of fireplaces within the structure
The type of heating used to heat the structure
A adjustment to the actual grade that is assigned to a particular parcel

attr.attrdef: Owner's last & first name for mailing purposes

attrdomv.udom: The current owner's first and last name that receives the tax bill for the particular parcel

attr.attrdef: Co-Owner's first name for mailing purposes

attrdomv.udom: The current co-owner's first name that receives the tax bill for the particular parcel

attr.attrdef: Street number and name for mailing purposes

attrdomv.udom: The current mailing address to receive the tax bill for the particular parcel

attr.attrdef: City, State and Zip code for mailing purposes

attrdomv.udom: The current City, State and zipcode for the particular parcel to receive the tax bill

attrdef.#value: Area of feature in internal units squared.
